transcript.narrator_intro: Listen to a conversation between a man and a woman.

dialogue.speaker: M1
dialogue.text: Are you going to the campus book club meeting tonight?

dialogue.speaker: F1
dialogue.text: Yes. We're discussing a novel I finished last week, and I'm excited to hear everyone's opinions.

transcript.question_intro: Why is the woman attending the meeting?

questions.prompt: Why is the woman attending the meeting?

choices.text: To discuss a novel with the group.
To sign up for a literature class.
To meet the author of the novel.

questions.explanation: She wants to discuss the novel and hear other members' opinions.
questions.evidence: We're discussing a novel I finished last week, and I'm excited to hear everyone's opinions.
